name: triggered_overrides_locked_state
description: is_triggered=True AND currently_breakeven_locked=True: override BEATS the floor. stop_trigger_level == TRIGGERED_OVERRIDE_LEVEL (-999.0), NOT the floored 0.0.
derivation: dynamic_activation = 1.5. threshold = 1.3. current_return (2.0) >= 1.3 -> ticks++ -> 9. Already locked, stays locked. Locked -> would-be floor = max(-1.0, 0.0) = 0.0. BUT is_triggered=True -> override -> stop_trigger_level = -999.0 (BEATS the 0.0 floor). Catches an impl that applied the override BEFORE the floor (would emit 0.0 after re-flooring -999.0).
